description: Shipment record of goods that were shipped in the ship “Ben Daysur”. Around 1045. Different merchants recorded their shipments, probably from Mahdiyya to Alexandria. Mentions fabrics, cloths from Qayrawan, silk, tin, and oil. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #361) VMR
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
